title: stelis reniformis
intro: Stelis reniformis, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, Stelis reniformis has been used in folk medicine due to its reported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and possessing antimicrobial properties. Stelis reniformis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
